Notes: NAC Tournament Semifinal (#3 seed at #2 seed)...CUW advances to championship
game on Sat. at Wisconsin Lutheran...EC's Scheele matches her career-high in
points in the final game of her career...Scheele finishes her career with
2,120 points and 1,047 rebounds and 53 career double-doubles.
